title: What do you think the lyrics in the bridge of Thanatos If I Cant Be Yours are
display_title: What do you think the lyrics in the bridge of Thanatos If I Cant Be Yours are
wikitext: []: What do you think the lyrics in the bridge of Thanatos -If I Can't Be Yours- are?             Quote Post by ReiAyanamiGaming » Thu Dec 09, 2021 4:54 pm I've been wondering this for a while. I know that the lyrics in the bridge are saying something, but I've never seen anyone try to determine what. While I'm not entirely sure, it sounds to me like the last bit is "I'll be it." This would make sense considering the rest of the lyrics and what Thanatos is about, but I can't really figure out what the rest of it is. What do you think?

chunks.content:
Article: What do you think the lyrics in the bridge of Thanatos If I Cant Be Yours are
[]: What do you think the lyrics in the bridge of Thanatos -If I Can't Be Yours- are?             Quote Post by ReiAyanamiGaming » Thu Dec 09, 2021 4:54 pm I've been wondering this for a while. I know that the lyrics in the bridge are saying something, but I've never seen anyone try to determine what. While I'm not entirely sure, it sounds to me like the last bit is "I'll be it." This would make sense considering the rest of the lyrics and what Thanatos is about, but I can't really figure out what the rest of it is. What do you think?
